parents.subject: LU-19657 build: allow customizable release ID

commit.subject: LU-19092 pcc: avoid hybrid I/O switch for PCC data copy
commit.message:
LU-19092 pcc: avoid hybrid I/O switch for PCC data copy

PCC data copy in buffered I/O mode is using kernel buffer which
cannot be used by direct I/O. Thus it should  disable hybrid I/O
switch for the file doing PCC attach.

Otherwise, it will panic sanity-pcc/40 in ll_release_user_pages()
after the buffered I/O for PCC attach is switched into direct I/O.

Signed-off-by: Yingjin Qian <qian@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Iacc5e3a4e6f9bf2d3c866570233fb8f89e5e9cb6
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/62842
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
